entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the primary crop studied for root traits and productivity under moisture stress

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: RLD, a root trait measured to assess genetic variability and drought avoidance

entities.name: DEEP ROOT SYSTEM
entities.description: A root trait associated with improving productivity under receding soil moisture conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT AVOIDANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to avoid drought stress, often through specific root traits

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE DEFICIT
entities.description: Receding soil moisture conditions that affect crop productivity

entities.name: CYLINDER CULTURE SYSTEM
entities.description: A method used to investigate genetic variability for root traits

entities.name: MINI-CORE GERMPLASM COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection used for genetic study

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES OF CHICKPEA
entities.description: Species related to Cicer arietinum used to compare root growth

entities.name: C. RETICULATUM
entities.description: A specific wild relative of chickpea with relatively better root growth

entities.name: ICC 8261
entities.description: An outstanding genotype in the mini-core collection with large RLD and a deep root system

entities.name: ICC 4958
entities.description: An accession confirmed as a source for drought avoidance with a prolific and deep root system

entities.name: MEDITERRANEAN
entities.description: A region where chickpea landraces with significantly larger RLD were collected

entities.name: WEST ASIAN REGION
entities.description: A region where chickpea landraces with significantly larger RLD were collected

entities.name: SOUTH ASIAN REGION
entities.description: A region where chickpea landraces showed smaller RLD compared to other regions

entities.name: CENTRAL ASIA
entities.description: A region characterized by arid agro-climatic conditions and landraces with larger RLD

entities.name: FORMER SOVIET UNION
entities.description: The geographical area associated with central Asia in the study

entities.name: ARID AGRO-CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterizing central Asia

entities.name: GERMPLASM EXPLORATION
entities.description: The process of searching for new landraces with desirable traits like large RLD

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: A genetic measure of the proportion of trait variation due to genetic factors

entities.name: PLANT DRY WEIGHT TO ROOT LENGTH DENSITY RATIO
entities.description: A root-related trait investigated for genetic variability

relationships.target: PLANT DRY WEIGHT TO ROOT LENGTH DENSITY RATIO
